headline: Tech & AI lead with MSFT/META/AAPL earnings this week; Energy lags as oil war-premium fades; FOMC July 29 is the #1 risk event.
Energy (XLE) and Tech/AI (XLK) lead a narrow-breadth bull tape; Gold Miners (GDX) are the cleanest short as cost inflation bites miners despite $4,100 gold — FOMC July 29 is the week's landmine.
Iran war lifts Energy (+74) and Industrials (+66) while AI chip selloff keeps Semis bearish (−48); GOOGL earnings tonight is the week's pivot.
Financials & Energy lead as semis correct; June CPI beat reduces hike risk, but FOMC Jul 28–29 and Iran tensions keep the tape mixed.
Financials lead after historic bank earnings; semis rebound on soft CPI; XLC and Energy lag as Iran sanctions wildcard looms today.
